title: AlleleForge: a variant-driven, multi-modality, uncertainty-aware CRISPR guide & edit design framework
description: AlleleForge takes a sequence variant and returns a ranked, uncertainty-annotated set of candidate CRISPR edit designs across SpCas9 nuclease, base editing, and prime editing, with calibrated uncertainty on every prediction and population- and haplotype-aware off-target analysis. It ships CRISPR-Bench, a frozen, calibration-first benchmark. Research and educational use only; not a medical device and not medical advice.
